research.interface: Terraform Enterprise REST API v2 (/api/v2, JSON:API): workspace variables endpoints (stable)

official_sources.title: API documentation for Terraform Enterprise
official_sources.used_for: /api/v2 base path, Authorization: Bearer token auth, application/vnd.api+json JSON:API media type, JSON:API errors array shape, and 404 responses masking unauthorized resources

official_sources.title: /workspaces/{id}/vars API reference for Terraform Enterprise (Workspace Variables)
official_sources.used_for: GET /workspaces/:workspace_id/vars list with no documented pagination parameters, POST create body (data.type vars; key/value/description/category/hcl/sensitive, category terraform or env, defaults), PATCH /workspaces/:workspace_id/vars/:variable_id repeating data.id in the body, DELETE /workspaces/:workspace_id/vars/:variable_id, and the sensitive write-once-not-visible-thereafter rule

research.language_rationale: There is no official HashiCorp Python SDK for the TFE API; the documented integration surface is the raw JSON:API REST contract at /api/v2, and Python's stdlib urllib/json stack is the idiomatic zero-dependency way to implement a small reconciler against it.

verified_facts: Workspace variables are listed with GET /api/v2/workspaces/:workspace_id/vars; the current official page documents no query parameters for this endpoint, so the response is the complete variable set (this corrects an older assumption that page[number]/page[size] applied here).

A variable object has type vars and attributes key, value, description, category, hcl, and sensitive; category must be terraform or env, and the same key can exist in both categories as two distinct variables.
A sensitive variable is written once and not visible thereafter, so read responses do not expose its value; clients must reconcile sensitive variables on metadata only.

Variables are created with POST /api/v2/workspaces/:workspace_id/vars carrying a JSON:API document with data.type vars and the attribute set; value defaults to the empty string, hcl and sensitive default to false.

Variables are updated with PATCH /api/v2/workspaces/:workspace_id/vars/:variable_id whose body repeats the variable id in data.id alongside data.type vars, and deleted with DELETE /api/v2/workspaces/:workspace_id/vars/:variable_id.

All requests carry Authorization: Bearer <token>, bodies use application/vnd.api+json, errors arrive as JSON:API error documents ({"errors": [{status, title, detail}]}), and 404 is returned both for missing resources and for resources the token is not authorized to see.
